package rulecoverage

func NegativeMiddlewareOpensTransaction() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_opens_transaction"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Middleware that owns transaction lifetime for all downstream business logic."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
